title: The Backworld
description: This mod adds the Backrooms to Minecraft. It is based off the popular fictional universe titled "the Backrooms".
body:
Based off the popular fictional universe, this mod adds the Backrooms to your game.

If you ever end up in the wrong spot, and the blocks line up perfectly, you may end up in an inescapable labyrinthine structure of infinite rooms and the buzz of lights, surrounded by monoyellow and wet carpet that never dries.
